title: The Enemy
writer: John Colton, Willis Goldbeck, Agnes Christine Johnston
actors: Lillian Gish, Ralph Forbes, Ralph Emerson
plot: Carl Behrend, son of a wealthy businessman, marries Pauli Arndt, daughter of a pacifist professor. When World War I breaks out, Carl is drafted. Pauli and her family and friends are left behind to experience the suffering which be...
